home.title: Recall.bio
home.subtitle: Document your life through daily responses. Reflect, learn, and preserve your voice for yourself and the people you choose.

hero.title: Your Life, Your Voice, Your Legacy
hero.heroSubtitle: The easiest life story documentation app — one question a day.
hero.subtitle: Recall makes life story documentation effortless. Answer one daily question by voice or text and build a lasting archive of memories and wisdom to share with family.
hero.stackSmellQuestion: What is a smell that brings you peace?
hero.stackAdviceQuestion: What advice would you give your younger self?
hero.stackAdviceAnswer: Take the photos even if you feel awkward. Write down the recipes your grandmother cooks by heart. The small, quiet moments you think you'll remember forever are precisely the ones that fade first. Don't rush so much.

problem.title: Life Moves Fast
problem.description: Important moments, meaningful conversations, and the lessons that define who you are fade over time. Without documenting them, those stories slip away.
problem.point3: Your voice gets lost in time

solution.title: Preserve Your Story, One Day at a Time
solution.description: Recall.bio helps you document your life in a simple and meaningful way. Each day, answer a thoughtful question and build an emotional archive that you and the people you choose will treasure forever.

feature1.title: Daily Questions
feature1.description: Receive a unique question each day designed to inspire reflection and connection with yourself.

feature2.title: Audio & Text
feature2.description: Document your memories in text or record your voice to preserve emotion, tone, and your unique way of expressing yourself.

feature3.title: Share Your Legacy
feature3.description: Choose who to share your memories with. You decide when and with whom to share your story.

feature4.title: Complete Privacy
feature4.description: Your memories are encrypted and only you control who has access.

dailyQuestion.question: "What is a smell that brings you peace?"

privacy.badge: Your memories are under lock and key

step1.title: Sign Up Free
step1.description: Create your account in less than a minute. No credit card required.

step2.title: Answer Daily
step2.description: Each day you receive a unique question. Take a few minutes to reflect and respond.

step3.title: Build Your Archive
step3.description: Over time, your responses become a complete archive of your life, thoughts, and wisdom.

step4.title: Share When You Want
step4.description: Choose who to share your legacy with. You can activate access whenever you decide.

testimonial1.quote: Recall.bio has helped me document moments I never wanted to forget. It's like having a personal journal that my children will be able to read someday.
testimonial1.author: Maria G.

testimonial2.quote: The best part is that I can record my voice. When my grandchildren hear my stories, they'll hear my real voice, not just words on a page.
testimonial2.author: Carlos R.

testimonial3.quote: Receiving my father's digital legacy was incredibly emotional. His words and voice helped me feel closer to him and better understand his story.
testimonial3.author: Ana L.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Your privacy is our priority. All data is encrypted and only you control who has access to your memories.
faq.a2: You can export all your memories in JSON or PDF format, including your audio files. At Anytime
faq.q3: What if I forget to answer one day?
faq.a3: No problem. You can continue with today's question.
faq.q4: How do I share my legacy?
faq.a4: You can designate one or more trusted people at any time. You can activate access immediately or schedule it for the future.
faq.a5: Recall.bio is completely free. We believe preserving your legacy shouldn't have a cost.

cta.title: Start Documenting Your Life Today
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of people preserving their stories, reflecting on their lives, and building their legacy.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: Please read these Terms of Service carefully before using Recall.bio.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing or using Recall.bio (the "Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you disagree with any part of the terms, you do not have permission to access the Service.

description_service.title: 2. Description of Service
description_service.content: Recall.bio is a digital platform that allows users to answer daily prompts, record audio or text life updates, and save them securely as a digital legacy. We provide tools to designate heirs who can access this archive in the future.

obligations.title: 3. User Obligations
obligations.content: You are responsible for safeguarding the password that you use to access the Service and for any activities or actions under your password. You agree not to disclose your password to any third party. You must notify us immediately upon becoming aware of any breach of security or unauthorized use of your account.

content_ownership.title: 4. Your Content and Privacy
content_ownership.content: You retain all rights and ownership to the thoughts, memories, audio recordings, and text you submit to Recall.bio. We do not claim ownership over your data. We only use your data to provide the Service as described in our Privacy Policy. All user content is encrypted to ensure privacy.

intellectual_property.title: 5. Intellectual Property
intellectual_property.content: The Service and its original content, features, and functionality (excluding user-provided memories) are and will remain the exclusive property of Recall.bio and its licensors.

liability.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: In no event shall Recall.bio be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential or punitive damages, including without limitation, loss of profits, data, use, goodwill, or other intangible losses, resulting from your access to or use of or inability to access or use the Service.

termination.title: 7. Termination
termination.content: We may terminate or suspend your account immediately, without prior notice or liability, for any reason whatsoever, including without limitation if you breach the Terms. Upon termination, your right to use the Service will immediately cease.

changes.title: 8. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify or replace these Terms at any time. We will provide notice of any significant changes. By continuing to access or use our Service after those revisions become effective, you agree to be bound by the revised terms.

contact.title: 9. Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at {contactEmail}.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: At Recall.bio, your privacy is our priority. We are committed to protecting your personal data and ensuring your memories remain secure.

collect.title: 1. Information We Collect
collect.content: We collect information you provide directly to us when you create an account (name, email), answer daily prompts (text, audio, images), update your profile, and designate legacy heirs (their names and emails). We also automatically collect some usage data and device information when you access our service.

use.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
use.content: We use your information to provide, maintain, and improve our Service. This includes saving your memories, processing audio transcriptions, authenticating your account, and sending legacy invitations to your designated heirs when you choose to do so.

storage.title: 3. Data Storage and Security
storage.content: Your memories are encrypted at rest and in transit. We use industry-standard security measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. You are the only one who controls who has access to your legacy.

retention.title: 4. Data Retention
retention.content: We keep your personal information and memories for as long as your account is active. If you choose to delete your account, or specific memories, they will be permanently removed from our active databases, though some data may remain in secure backups for a limited time.

third_parties.title: 5. Third-Party Services
third_parties.content: We do not sell your personal data. We may share information with trusted third-party service providers (such as hosting or database providers like Supabase, or AI transcription services) strictly for the purpose of operating our Service. These providers are bound by strict confidentiality agreements.

cookies.title: 6. Cookies and Tracking
cookies.content: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track activity on our Service and hold certain information, primarily to keep you logged in and understand how users interact with our platform to improve the experience.

rights.title: 7. Your Rights
rights.content: You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal information and memories at any time through your account settings. You can also request a full export of your data. If you wish to exercise these rights and need assistance, please contact us.

contact.title: 8. Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at {contactEmail}.

pricingPage.title: Preserve Your Legacy
pricingPage.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your storytelling journey. Start for free, upgrade to unlock AI magic, and eventually print your story.
